title: Mandatory Subitems Complete to move Primary Status
excerpt: Is it possible to make moving a field to the next stage contingent on subitems being completed? That way my team is marking off all subitems as done.

posts.author: ElizabethMonday (Elizabeth Sway)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to make moving a field to the next stage contingent on subitems being completed? That way my team is marking off all subitems as done.
